name: Braunschweiger Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the liver sausage and all of the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
2. Pat the mixture into the bowl lined with plastic wrap.
3. Cover with the plastic wrap and chill.
4. Invert the chilled mixture onto a serving platter and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
5. Serve with crackers.
Yield: about 1-1/2 cups.
